data.title: Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds (NYSE: ASGI, THQ) announced distributions on Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, the Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds (NYSE: ASGI, THQ) declared distributions to shareholders. The distributions were paid on a per share basis, with specific amounts outlined in the table below. This announcement was made by the Funds, indicating the successful disbursement of funds to all shareholders on the specified date.

data.title: North European Oil Royalty Trust declares $0.22 per unit distribution for Q1 of fiscal 2026, payable on Feb 25, 2026.
data.description: Today, in East Schodack, New York, the Trustees of North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE-NRT) made an announcement regarding their quarterly distribution. For the first quarter of fiscal 2026, they declared a payment of $0.22 per unit. This payment is set to be distributed on February 25, 2026, to shareholders recorded as owners on February 13, 2026.

data.title: Park Dental Partners set dates for Q4 and full year 2025 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: Park Dental Partners has revealed that they will be releasing their fourth quarter and fiscal year earnings on a specific date. The earnings call will also be held on this date to discuss the financial performance of the company. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate valuable insights into the company's financial standing for the quarter and the fiscal year as a whole. This announcement signifies a key update for those interested in the company's financial health and performance.

data.title: America's Freedom Tribute, a 80% replica of the Vietnam Wall, returns to Coachella Valley on Feb. 8, 2026. Wall is 350ft long, 8ft tall.
data.description: In Palm Springs, California on January 30, 2026, the Palm Springs Air Museum is excited to announce the arrival of America's Freedom Tribute, featuring an 80% replica of the Vietnam Wall and the Cost of Freedom Tribute. The Traveling Wall spans about 350 feet in length and stands 8 feet tall, serving as a powerful reminder of the sacrifices made by veterans.

data.title: Uniti Group Inc. completed a $960.1 million inaugural Kinetic Fiber Securitization Notes offering, secured by fiber network assets.
data.description: Little Rock, Arkansas, January 30, 2026 - Uniti Group Inc. (Nasdaq: UNIT) announced that its subsidiary, Kinetic ABS Issuer LLC, has successfully completed its first offering of secured fiber network revenue term notes. The offering amounted to $960,100,000 in aggregate principal. The notes are set to be repaid by February 2031 and are backed by specific residential fiber network assets and customer agreements in several states including Arkansas, Georgia, Kentucky, Ohio, and Texas. Both the Issuer and its parent company, along with subsidiaries, are classified as "unrestricted subsidiaries" as per Uniti's credit agreement and existing senior notes indentures.

data.title: Employers Holdings, Inc. will release Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 19, 2026, after market close.
data.description: In Reno, Nevada on January 30, 2026, Employers Holdings, Inc. revealed that it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 after the market closes on February 19, 2026. The information will be accessible on the Company’s website (www.employers.com) via the “Investors” section following the release. Employers Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EIG.

data.title: Credicorp Ltd. to release 4Q25 earnings on Feb 12, 2026, after market close. Lima, Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Credicorp Ltd., based in Lima, Peru, disclosed that it will release its 4th Quarter 2025 financial results on February 12, 2026, after the market closes. Shareholders and the market were informed of this upcoming announcement.

data.title: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I (Nasdaq: ZKPU) to trade Class A shares and warrants separately from Feb 4, 2026.
data.description: Miami, Florida - On January 30, 2026, Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I disclosed that starting from February 4, 2026, investors who purchased units in the Company's IPO will have the option to independently trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units. The Company is listed on Nasdaq as ZKPU.
House China Panel writes to the Treasury on China and US Medical tech, with Moolenar urging CFIS action on China ties to FastWave Medical.

data.title: Onity Group closes $200 million Senior Notes offering for PHH Corporation and PHH Escrow Issuer LLC at 9.875% due 2029.
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on January 30, 2026, Onity Group Inc. disclosed that its affiliates, PHH Corporation and PHH Escrow Issuer LLC (the Issuers), successfully completed the sale of 9.875% Senior Notes maturing in 2029 (known as the PHH Senior Notes). The offering generated $200 million in total principal amount.

data.title: Xsolla SPAC 1 closes $200M IPO, offering 20M units at $10 each, consisting of a share and half of a warrant, with underwriters having option of 3M more units.
data.description: Xsolla SPAC 1, a newly established special purpose acquisition company based in Sherman Oaks, CA, recently concluded its initial public offering of a total of 20,000,000 units. Priced at $10.00 per unit, each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and half of a redeemable warrant. The warrant, which will fully come into effect either upon the company's initial business combination or after 12 months from the Effective Date, allows the holder to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50. Additionally, the underwriter has been granted the option to purchase an extra 3,000,000 units within 45 days following the closing of the offering.

data.title: Arbor Realty Trust (NYSE: ABR) disclosed tax treatment of 2025 dividends for common and preferred shares.
data.description: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc., headquartered in Uniondale, New York, disclosed the tax treatment of its dividend distributions for the year 2025 on January 30, 2026. The company trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ABR. The announcement covered the tax implications for both common and preferred shares of beneficial interest.

data.title: DBM Global Inc. to pay cash dividend of $5 million, $1.30 per share on Feb 24, 2026 to stockholders of record by Feb 9.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, DBM Global Inc. stated that it will distribute a cash dividend of around $5 million, equating to $1.30 per share, on February 24, 2026. This dividend will be provided to DBM Global Inc.'s shareholders of record as of the closing of business on February 9, 2026. DBM Global Inc. is a group of firms that offers fully integrated steel construction services and is a subsidiary of INNOVATE Corp. publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol VATE.

data.title: Crescent Biopharma granted 117,339 shares to five non-executive employees as inducement awards.
data.description: In WALTHAM, Mass., on January 30, 2026, Crescent Biopharma, Inc. announced the approval by its Compensation Committee of the grant of options to purchase 117,339 shares of the Company’s ordinary shares. These options were provided as equity inducement awards to five non-executive employees under the Inducement Plan. The approval was granted on January 29, 2026, and each employee's acceptance of employment with Crescent was contingent on these options as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Crescent is a Nasdaq-listed clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing cancer therapies.

data.title: Taitron Components Inc. (OTCID:TAIT) announces $0.035 quarterly dividend per share, totalling $0.14 per share annually.
data.description: Taitron Components Incorporated (OTCID:TAIT) revealed today that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.035 per share of common stock. Stockholders of record as of February 13, 2026, will receive this dividend on February 27, 2026. The Company aims to provide an annual cash dividend of $0.14 per share, given out in $0.035 increments on a quarterly basis as per their existing dividend policy.
